prompt: We only have `.agents/scratchpad/feature-export/spec.md` so far and want another agent session to continue from there. Save a handoff now that summarizes the goal, current status, relevant files, and the next move.
assertions: Recognizes that a scratchpad spec file is enough to select the feature-scoped output path.
Writes the handoff beside the spec as `.agents/scratchpad/feature-export/handoff.md`.
Keeps the handoff continuation-oriented, with the next step anchored to the active feature context.
